generic_name: LYCOPODIUM CLAVATUM, PANCREAS SUIS, DNA, INSULINUM (HUMAN), PHOSPHORICUM ACIDUM, RADIUM BROMATUM, URANIUM NITRICUM
active_ingredients: ACTIVE INGREDIENTS: (in each spray) DNA 30X, 60X, 100X, 1000X, Insulinum 12X, 60X, 100X, 1000X, Lycopodium Clavatum 6X, Pancreas Suis 9X, 12X, 30X, 100X, Phosphoricum Acidum 30X, Radium Bromatum 60X, Uranium Nitricum 30C.
indications_and_usage: USES: Assists in support of the pancreas.† †Claims based on traditional homeopathic practice, not accepted medical evidence. Not FDA evaluated.
dosage_and_administration: DIRECTIONS: • Adults: 2 to 3 sprays orally, three times daily. Children under twelve one half adult dosage. • Do not take within 15 minutes of consuming food, beverage or brushing teeth. • Consult a physician for use in children under 12 years of age.
